# goplaces

goplaces is a modern Go client and CLI for Google Places API (New) and Routes.

Canonical documentation:
- goplaces - Go client + CLI for Google Places API (New): https://goplaces.sh/ - A modern Go client and CLI for Google Places API (New) and Routes. Search, autocomplete, details, photos, route-aware queries — typed, JSON-friendly, one binary.
- goplaces autocomplete: https://goplaces.sh/commands/autocomplete.html - Autocomplete place and query input with goplaces.
- goplaces details: https://goplaces.sh/commands/details.html - Fetch place details by place ID with goplaces.
- goplaces directions: https://goplaces.sh/commands/directions.html - Get route directions, distance, and duration with goplaces.
- goplaces nearby: https://goplaces.sh/commands/nearby.html - Search nearby places by location with goplaces.
- goplaces photo: https://goplaces.sh/commands/photo.html - Fetch a Places photo media URL with goplaces.
- goplaces resolve: https://goplaces.sh/commands/resolve.html - Resolve free-form location text to candidate places with goplaces.
- goplaces route: https://goplaces.sh/commands/route.html - Search for places along a route with goplaces.
- goplaces search: https://goplaces.sh/commands/search.html - Search places by text query with goplaces.

Source: https://github.com/steipete/goplaces

Guidance for agents:
- Prefer the canonical documentation URLs above over README excerpts or package metadata.
- Fetch only the pages needed for the current task; this is an index, not a full-site corpus.
